reviews.title: It's a mouse, it works.
reviews.text:
When purchasing a bluetooth mouse, or any bluetooth device, an important factor is how well it connects and how well it STAYS connected. After all this time, the industry still can’t make up its mind about how bluetooth works:
- Microsoft with their mouse and Sony with their controller that pair without the need of a code (which Android’s bluetooth stack doesn’t support).
- Mice and keyboards that will not reconnect after it wakes from sleep mode.
- To this day, bluetooth devices still can’t wake a computer from suspend state.
So when I get a simple bluetooth mouse for a good price, and it actually works as expected, I was happy.

For my review, I’m comparing the Bornd mouse to the [[ASIN:B006428K7I Motorola 89519N Bluetooth Mouse]] which I got in a set that included the [[ASIN:B004L9MBH6 Motorola Wireless Keyboard for Motorola ATRIX and XOOM (Motorola Retail Packaging)]].

With the Motorola mouse, its frequency somehow conflicts with the Motorola keyboard, resulting in sticky keys, as in “I’m having a good daaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaay”. Conversely, the keyboard interferes with the mouse where the computer would actually lose connection with the mouse for a few seconds after typing, or lose connection completely.

What I liked about the Bornd:
- Pairing was simple using the button at the bottom of the mouse.
- Operating distance is about 5 feet, but this may be because of my computer’s bluetooth antenna
- Takes a single AA battery which lasts over a month of moderate use (2 hours per day)
- Mouse movement is good. No need to adjust mouse speed in the control panel.
- Accuracy is good. Editing images using Pixlr.com, I’m able to select precisely the parts of the image I need.

What gave me trouble with the Bornd:
- When you first put your hand on this mouse, you will not feel that it is very well built. The plastic is completely smooth and the mouse wheel seems to rattle when you shake it. I got used to it after a few minutes, though.
- The mouse reconnects with the computer most of the time, but sometimes it was necessary to turn the mouse off and on again after the computer reboots or if the computer was out of range for an extended period of time.
- Lately, I’ve been experiencing double-clicks when I click on the left mouse button once. I’m usually able to fix this by getting angry and slamming the mouse down a couple of times. This may indicate a build quality issue with this mouse.

In my specific case, the Bournd did not interfere with my Motorola keyboard at all and it seems the sticky key occurs only when the batteries on the keyboard runs low.

reviews.title: I really do "love it".
reviews.text: I am using this device with an Asus Transformer Book T100TA touch screen notebook I recently purchased.  The device was recognized and connected to the notebook with no unusual delays or difficulties.  it works well with the PC as I recline in my easy-chair, using small motions upon the arm of the chair and allowing me to navigate through email and web browsing and to play games.  It is a nice compliment to the available on-screen gesture controls of the computer, especially for a die-hard convert from Windows XP and Windows 7 operating systems.

Slim and Portable Design Compact and portable, the slim wireless mouse can be easily put into your bag or even pocket. Great for business trips or travelling. reviews.title: you get what you pay for
reviews.text: these work but feel like crap.  Left and right click are terrible.  Sometimes when I left click, as the piece of plastic is coming back up, it goes under the right side.  Its like someone took a solid sheet of plastic and cut a line down the middle to allow you to press down on the left or right side, its terrible.  Scroll wheel feels fine.  DPI button just cycles through, no way to go up or down, just cycles through 3 modes.  Very uncomfortable.  For the price, you get two and both are exactly like this so I doubt its defective.  I only got these to control my streaming PC so its not a HUGE deal, but if youre getting these for daily use - DONT DO IT.  I can hardly put up with these and I use them for maybe 10 mins a day.  Pay 15$ for one mouse.  I honestly feel like I could crush these with my hand - thats how crappy they feel.  They also go to sleep mode after like 5 mins so I have to constantly click it to wake it up, and it ends up opening apps.  Not worth the 15$

reviews.title: Excellent Keyboard!
reviews.text: This was a Christmas gift for my daughter and she absolutely loves everything about this keyboard. Thank you

reviews.title: Keyboard is very loud when typing!
reviews.text: The mouse is pretty standard, nothing great, but nothing bad. I brought my cute little set to work in my laptop bag so I figured it was secure. When I took the keyboard out 1 letter had popped off. No biggie, it snapped back on easily. The keyboard buttons are bit higher than I'm used to so I was typing slower and it was a bit uncomfortable after a while. I planned on switching back to my regular keyboard shortly but what escalated that switch was how loud the keyboard was while I was typing. My office is usually rather quiet plus I'm in a cubicle and a coworker asked what are you doing over there!?! He said it sounded like I was hammering the letters with a small hammer. I knew it was loud but after realizing it was bothering my coworkers I immediately put it in my bag to bring home. Haven't used it since!

reviews.title: Nice keyboard and mouse set
reviews.text: This is a great mouse and keyboard set, feels like typing on an old typewriter but more comfortable. I like the combined usb. Looks very nice, comfortable to use,

reviews.title: Amusing
reviews.text: I really like this set. They both match perfectly. The keyboard is comfortable and all the buttons work perfectly. I like the round buttons they are pretty cool. Connects easy enough. Just wish it was rechargeable.

reviews.title: Plug and Play Wireless Keyboard; Not sure about the mouse
reviews.text: I run Windows 10 on my laptop, and this wireless keyboard was up and running in few minutes after unpackaging.  You will need to provide your own batteries (2 AA – one for the mouse and one for the keyboard).  The keys are not tactile like other “typewriter” keyboard I have, but the keys have enough tension in the loaded spring to give a slight “satisfactory” feel to the keystrokes.  The wireless connection between the receiver and the keyboard/mouse was responsive and experienced no noticeable delay.  I am not 100% sold on the “milk tea” colored keyboard, but it slowly grew on me after a few days of use, although my 8-year young daughter thought it was like a puke color… an interesting observation.  The mouse was not for me.  It was too flat and too small for my hand, and after a few hours of cumbersome use, I switched back to my existing mouse pad.  For less than $49 USD, I think this keyboard brings a fun look to the otherwise a boring office environment.

reviews.title: Work great
reviews.text:
The factory feet on my mouse were leaving dark spots on my light colored desk at work.
These fit great and have noticeably lower friction than the worn factory pads. The adhesive is strong but repositionable if you don't get it right first time.
When the old pads are removed, they can split into separate layers, but you should be able to get down to the bare plastic if you take care to grab the lowest layer of clear adhesive.

reviews.title: Amazing addition to the Logitech G Pro Wireless!
reviews.text: Great quality, precision cut pieces that fit EXACTLY in the shape of the mouse. Whoever designed the CAD for this did a great job on the measurements. Using the grip itself, also crazy how something so small makes a big difference. No more worrying about it slipping off my right thumb which I mentally couldn't handle. It's shame that Logitech didn't design the grip but this will do nicely until they do.

reviews.title: They're ok.
reviews.text:
I'm only using the side grips. (No issue with the texture of the buttons, so imo, its best to just not use them and keep the mouse as light as possible)

Its definitely an improvement over the stock plastic feel, which is too smooth for me. These add some grip, and even a bit of cushion.

Guess I was expecting a more grippy feeling. Maybe a more pronounced texture. There is definitely room for improvement for those of us with sweaty gaming hands.

I also wish the edges were tapered off at its edges rather than a hard cut, but that's a minor nitpick and not too important.

I will say with these grips, I am having trouble deciding between which mouse to use primarily... G Pro Wireless or Viper Ultimate. This is definitely something that was missing from the G Pro Wireless's design for me.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Was expecting more of a Dbrand style sticker, but this is even better. It's super rubbery and grippy. Don't ever plan on missing a shot when you play with this!

title: Neises Ergonomic Mouse, Bluetooth Mouse for ipad,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Air/Mac/MacBook Pro/Mini/ipad Pro/iMac/Laptop,Rechargeable Wireless Mouse for MacBook Air/MacBook pro Chromebook Laptop PC
description:
Tip:Scientific ergonomic design maintains healthy wrist and arm positions to achieve smoother movement and reduce overall stress.
How to use it:
A. 2.4Ghz Mode:
Switch to "ON/OFF" button to right.And Plug the receiver into the USB port or use a USB C adapter to plug into the type c port of your computer, Then you can use the mouse in 2.4GHz Mode.
B. Bluetooth Mode:
Switch on Bluetooth on your device and power on the mouse. Press the DPI Button or Press Left,Roller and Right 3 Buttons together for 5 seconds.When the mouse name coming up on the device.Click it and it will be connected.
Note:
System Requirement: Windows 8/10, Android 4.2 and above,Mac & IOS 10.10(Compatiable with 4.2BLE、4.1BLE、4.0BLE or earlier)
Package Included:
1* Dual Mode Mouse
1* Charging Cable
1*USB Receiver (under earth the mouse)
1*Type C Adapter
Note:
1. It's out of power if the mouse cursor moves slowly or stop moving. Please recharge it. Note: Please do not charge the mouse with mobile phone charger.
2. Please charge the mouse for 2 hours before the first time to use it. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.
3. Not all computers support two modes. For example, Win 7 system does not support Bluetooth mode.
4. There is memory function on Bluetooth Type Mouse.When the mouse has connected another device,and now you would like connect the device not connected with the mouse last time, it should re-connect with the device.
5. If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.
features: 【2022 Latest Upgrade Optical Ergonomic Design】Reduce the overall pressure on the hand, specially designed for long-term use of the mouse, providing a more comfortable way to use.

【DUAL MODE BLUETOOTH MOUSE(BT 5.1 + 2.4GHz)】Dual mode wireless mouse one mouse can switch freely between two devices. Note: If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.

【BUILT-IN BATTERY AND AUTO ENERGY-SAVING】The mouse built-in rechargeable battery, with a charging cable. No need to change batteries. To saving power, the mouse will fall asleep after 10 minutes no-operation, it can be waken up by clicking any button.

【3 ADJUSTABLE DPI LEVELS AND SILENT CLICK】 Among 1000, 1200 and 1600 to meet different needs. Special soundless design for the right and left buttons, make you concentrate on working or playing games without disturbing others.
【MULTI-FUNCTION BUTTON】Forward and backward button to provide convenience for browsing pages and games.

reviews.title: Liked it but doesn’t last long
reviews.text: The reviews seemed to be a mix so I figured I’d give the mouse a shot with my MacBook. Worked great until one week after the return window closed and now it’s worthless junk. I would skip this.

reviews.title: Wheel Started Squeaking Less than 2 Weeks into Usage
reviews.text: I love the design of this mouse but the scrolling wheel started squeaking when used less than 14 days into using this mouse and it's, quite honestly, a bit maddening.  I can't figure out WHY it's squeaking and I've tried using compressed air to maybe clean something that might have gotten into the mouse to no avail.  It still squeaks.  All. The. Time.

reviews.title: Works perfectly with my iPad
reviews.text:
I bought this so I could mirror my iPad to my 27" iMac and play some gorgeous games on a big screen. The mouse lets me use the iPad as an, um, mousepad...works beautifully. The instructions were easy to follow and the box contains a wireless receiver if you don't want to use bluetooth. Also in the box is a USB adapter if you need to plug the receiver into a USB-C port.

And finally, the color-changing light bar is kinda sexy. A bargain at the price.

reviews.title: Great mouse
reviews.text: Love this mouse. Attached it to an iPad keyboard so now able to use it along w/ iPencil & touch screen. Very easy to use, fits in my hand comfortably & the light that emanates from it is a nice touch.

reviews.title: I’d move on, if i were you…
reviews.text: It was an ok product only until 2.5/3 months after purchase when it stopped working…. It’s only used for person use 2-3X a week.. so it’s announced my that it broke already!!!!

title: LED Bluetooth Mouse for Laptop iPad MacBook pro Wireless Mouse for Laptop MacBook Air Mac Chromebook
description: Packing list: Instructions x1, LED charging Bluetooth + 2.4G dual-mode wireless mouse x1, 2.4g Nano USB wireless receiver x1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line x1, USB C-type adapter x1, packing box x1, How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:  Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse. How to connect to iPad Pro/iPad Air/ Mini/ iPhone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse  first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.) (1) open ipad Settings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)  🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse? 🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
features: 🖱💻🖥📱BEST COMPATIBLE BLUETOOTH 5.1 CHIP: Compatible with more than 99.8% Bluetooth devices. This bluetooth mouse is suitable for all laptops with bluetooth function or ipad iPhone with iOS13 or above
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
✅BUILT-IN BATTERY: Built-in battery,easy to charge by micro usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.please please keep the mouse power switch in "ON" position when charging .

✅ERGONOMIC DESIGN： Good surface coating technology given you a skin-like touch feeling. User-friendly design provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and pocket-sized perfect for travel, Mute design keeps away annoying clicks.

✅AUTO ENERGY-SAVINGSLEEPING MODE: Li-polymer batteries,high cycle life.the Auto Switch Off function will help you save energy as your bluetooth mouse will switch off when your PC is turned off or the receiver is disconnected. If you do not use the mouse for eight minutes, it will go to sleeping mode, you can press the any button to weak it up.

reviews.title: Bad product
reviews.text: It worked for a bit and then it just wouldn’t move ni matter if I charged it. Not happy

reviews.title: Lightweight and smooth.
reviews.text: Clicks easily and slides on mouse pad smoothly. A bit frustrating that it goes into sleep mode after a short time when I’m busy elsewhere but ease of use makes it okay. You need to be careful putting in the charger since the mouse is lightweight. And I love the pink color!

reviews.title: I like it
reviews.text: I like most of things to be wireless, and I really like this mouse because I have yet to have an issue with the bluetooth connection. I will say that you do have to push a bit harder to click the mouse than I am normally used to, but it's negligible and ultimately didn't bother me. I like the lights on it, and the side of the mouse works great for me (although it's a bit small for someone with big hands). I would buy again.

reviews.title: Goes to sleep when you need it the most
reviews.text: Won't stay connected to my laptop and goes to sleep.  Have to power cycle to get it to work again.  Even tried leaving the USB cable plugged in and it still goes to sleep.

reviews.title: Looks expensive but feels cheap
reviews.text:
The included USB charging line does not fit snug. Feels like an aftermarket adapter and felt as if the mouse would break is pushed all the way in or pulled out. Time will tell if the charging line lasts. I'll update as time goes on.

It has the feel of a toy but the girls in the house are already asking for one like it, so pretty sells. Color is towards the green scale but works well with seafoam colors.

reviews.title: For the price this is a good product!
reviews.text: A little larger than what I am use too. Automatic turn off. A small button to turn back on. So far so good it works great

reviews.title: Bluetooth frees up an extra port
reviews.text: Works great with new laptop and saves me a usb port by not having to use a usb connector

reviews.title: Comfortable to use as my everyday mouse.
reviews.text: I bought this Tecknet dual mode Bluetooth and 2.4 G mouse to replace a similar design 2.4 G only model. Although it works well after the Bluetooth connects, it can sometimes take a minute or so to connect with my Asus C302C Chromebook; other times it connects immediately. I don't really understand why. I think 4-1/2 stars is the right rating for this one. The connection issue is mildly irritating, but not a showstopper. I do recommend this mouse.

reviews.title: Awesome wireless mouse!
reviews.text: Bought this for my son’s new Mack book. Connected easily & works well. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Responsiveness is abysmal
reviews.text:
I have a Fellowes mouse pad (vinyl material) and this mouse moves the pointer on it like it is stuck in mud - very slow. Yes, i removed the coated ovals on the bottom. I tried on my desktop protective cover (a softer plastic) and it was even worse. Putting the mouse on paper made it move the mouse pointer faster and smoother but occasionally had hiccups. This is unacceptable for gaming, let alone basic office work. This wasn't even the worse part of this mouse.

The mouse buttons require you to click on the very edge of the button to recognize the click. Because my finger tips reach about 75% of the length I would have to click 3+ times to get Windows 11 to recognize I clicked the button. I made sure to charge the battery to 100% and tried numerous USB ports on my computer and on my docking station to no avail. Would not recommend.

reviews.title: Helped my forearm pain and works as described
reviews.text: Works as described, more natural wrist position and seems to be helping my forearm pain

reviews.title: Very nice mouse!
reviews.text:
I've seen a few of these mice around and this one was inexpensive enough to give the design a try. I normally use only Bluetooth mice because I don't like losing a USB port to a dongle, but made an exception.

I have to say I'm impressed with this device. The performance is rock-solid and it feels great to use. I also like the slightly rubberized finish; feels good in the hand. What I'm doing is alternating between this and a conventional mouse every few days to give my wrist a break. The reduction in wrist discomfort is noticeable.

It's worth losing a USB port to a dongle

reviews.title: Ergonomics
reviews.text: The concept of this mouse is that your hand is in a more natural position when you use it. That part works fine. There is a hesitation that occurs from time to time that will cause you some angst. The mouse button has to wake it from sleep mode, which also takes some getting used to. Overall it is a decent mouse and surprisingly easy to adapt to.

reviews.title: very comfortable and exactly what I needed
reviews.text:
Pros:
Light, comfortable, easy to setup, nice color pattern, and nice angle of lean. I was looking for something that wasn't too tall or buttons that were hard to reach. This worked
Cons:
feels a bit cheap and plasticky which for the price...DUHHH...
not for gaming or anything more than just casual home or work use

reviews.title: Nice, but too large for my hands
reviews.text: This was a nice mouse. Scrolled smoothly. However the scroll wheel was too far to comfortably use with my hands. I had to keep reaching for the wheel and it was causing stress on my elbows. I ended up retuning it. I will look for a smaller mouse that will fit my hands better. If you have large hands this mouse will work well for you.

reviews.title: Great product!
reviews.text: Super easy to install and perfect smooth glide.

reviews.title: Wish i had known about it sooner!
reviews.text: Took some getting used too, but i love it, it is much easier to use not so harsh on my wrist!

reviews.title: Great Ergo Mouse
reviews.text: It's a comfortable mouse...  my wrist doesn't hurt and it fits my abnormally small hands (I have to shop for gloves in the boys' section).  I like the button and wheel placement.  One thing that took a bit of getting used to but I've grown to like is the sleep function...  Sure it takes a click to wake it up, but it saves the batteries.

reviews.title: Really improve the feel
reviews.text:
Before this I have never really considered changing the mouse feet. The only reason I purchased these was because I need to remove the old ones to solder in a new switch.

With the new micro switches installed. https://amzn.to/3ElgafC ( incase you are curious which ones) and the new feet this made a whole new mouse.

The feet arrived perfect no bends or wrinkles. Super easy to install. Just make sure you clean the area really good with some alcohol.

They glide so much better than stock feet. The feel is simply amazing. Now whenever I purchase a new mouse I will be upgrading the feet. If you are on the fence about it I would say go for it.

For durability I have had these on for over a month and they have no signs of wear. They still perform excellent.

Thank you for taking the time to read this and I hope that it was helpful in your purchase decision

reviews.title: Love this mouse
reviews.text: Great color selection. Fits my hand well.

reviews.title: I'll never go back to a flat mouse
reviews.text: I was suffering from tennis elbow for months, badly, and nothing I did was making any difference.  I have a job typing about 10 hours a day, eight days a week:/ and did some research about posture and what could cause this.  Already had an ergo keyboard, so I bought this ergo mouse.  WOW.  Unbelievable how almost immediately the tennis elbow cleared up.  This was super easy to get use to.  I have small hands, and the size is perfect.  I will never use a flat mouse again.  So very glad I stumbled upon this.  Best money I've ever spent.  Oh, and I absolutely love the fact that I do not have to replace batteries every week!

reviews.title: Well designed mouse, nothing like it
reviews.text: I love picking out a color I will enjoy looking at, other than basic black or white mice. I wanted the blue one forever, and years ago I got one in pink instead of blue per their mistake. I just kept it. I used it and yes it still works, I really wanted the blue one so I took my time to look for another one just like it and yes it is hard to find this blue color. Beautiful. The fit is very smooth and soft and perfect, they know what hands like to rest in a cupped shape and this is comfortable to work with. The glide is excellent and can be used for everyday, office, or gaming. Take a look around at other styles but you will not find one that fits like this ergonomically for the price which you cannot beat. The best part is that it is rechargeable and yes it comes with the cord and also you can use it while it is charging. Keep your wrist happy and get one.

reviews.title: Great ergonomic feel!
reviews.text: This is a great wireless mouse! It has been wonders to my carpel tunnel on my hand and love the natural feel of this. All computer mouses should be made like this, it just makes sense when you first use it. Anyways, seems pretty sturdy and have had no complaints since receiving it. Smooth trailing, battery seems to last long and love that it goes to sleep mode when not in use. Also, love the color; it's exactly as pictured!

reviews.title: Nice. But too small...
reviews.text:
I normally use medium sized gloves. sometimes small.

This mouse was designed for smaller hands than mine.

It's a nice mouse. small, cheap, comfortable, works well. the scroll wheel was really fun to use. but it didn't work for my case.

reviews.title: Very Nice

Very nice. Looks good, I like the gold edging more than I thought I would. A little small, but I barely notice. The mouse I WAS using was HUGE, and my entire palm rested on it. This one only covers ⅔ of my palm.

Very comfortable.

Have not played anything that could be considered a stress test. I like that you can turn it off, but I dislike that you have to remember to turn it off.

I cannot tell if it goes to sleep.

reviews.title: wireless mouse
reviews.text: My old wireless finally died - dropped too many times onto the hardwood floor.  I purchased one that was like the old one and this one.  This one is flatter.  I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text: This is a good value for the cost.  If you need something small and easy to carry around with you this is great. Especially right now I am between working from home but sometimes have to visit the office and the less and smaller items I carry, the better!  This is nice and slim and works great with my laptop.  I don't really like to use batteries but as long as you switch it off when not in use you will be able to get quite a bit of use out of one.

reviews.title: Loses Connection CONSTANTLY
reviews.text: I have to turn it off and on about 5x a day because it randomly loses connectivity. When I am using it or idle for less than 1 min.

ERGONOMIC DESIGN : Good surface coating technology gives you a skin-like touch. The ergonomic design provides 24 hours comfort for your work and study, and the portable and pocket size are perfect for you.Built-in battery,easy to charge by usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.It can be easily activated by clicking any buttons.

AUTO ENERGY-SAVINGSLEEPING MODE: Li-polymer batteries,high cycle life.the Auto Switch Off function will help you save energy as your bluetooth mouse will switch off when your PC is turned off or the receiver is disconnected. If you do not use the mouse for 10 minutes, it will go to sleeping mode.
BEST COMPATIBLE BLUETOOTH & RECEIVER: Compatible with more than 99.9% Bluetooth devices. This bluetooth mouse is suitable for all laptops with bluetooth function or ipad iPhone with iOS13 or above.
SERVICE SUPPORT :We provides you with 24-hour email contact service.If you have any mouse questions or needs, please feel free to contact us.

reviews.title: It works! 🤗
reviews.text:
I love the size & the LED feature. It paired perfectly with my iPad so now I can do my work on the go!

I think it’s so clever that it’s a three in one product & it has a little nook to hold the USB plug under the mouse so you don’t have to worry about it getting lost.

Great product with a great price point.

reviews.title: Junk
reviews.text: Junk plastic. Broken.

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text: Love the alternating colors

reviews.title: Great looking and feeling mouse!
reviews.text: I LOVE THIS MOUSE! I got in real and I love the strip of light along the sides. I had to dock a star because the little usb that gets stored on the bottom won’t come out. The little notch isn’t deep enough for my nails or a card to go under. (See photo). Although, I’m still able to use it via Bluetooth and that works great. I have no idea what the DPI button on the top does since the instructions don’t say anything about it. Oh and I’ve been using it for about 2.5 weeks now and I haven’t had to recharge the battery. 👍🏼

reviews.title: love it
reviews.text: love it
